name: internal-assistant-finalization
title: Internal assistant finalization
description: Finalize the internal assistant from MVP into an authenticated product workspace with real session history, admin/member management, curated internal knowledge, scoped Qdrant RAG sync/retrieve, safe diagnostics, and production docs.
creator: zhang
notes: Planning completed around the recommended final-shape path: keep invite/member auth, build real session history and admin management, add database-managed curated internal knowledge, sync active/reviewed docs to Qdrant internal collection through the RAG Orchestrator, and avoid live model/provider liveness tests. Implemented first focused slice: per-member server-side model channel assignment via ASSISTANT_MODEL_CHANNELS_JSON, Member.modelChannelId, internal chat channel routing, admin member/channel APIs, admin UI assignment control, docs, and local mock smoke coverage.
